text:
It was dark. I didn't know it. I walked home tired. There was something on my mind. I reached my room. What did I want?. I thought some chocolate. I sat.

Nothing tastes good.

Maybe I watch tv.


I just sleep.


I fall asleep eating.



Sometimes. Just thinking. I hear it.


What's that?


Nothing important.

But I knew. There was. Something.

A moth.


Just flew.


I thought.


That.




That's beautiful?

Something.

What's your name?


Something.


That sounds good.




Now think.




What would I do?.



I think. You.


Just think. Anything.


My cat loves fish.



That would work?


Try.





A fish friend.




You think.



Maybe.



That's enough.




I think.



You're great.




It loves me.


That thinks.



Just eat stuff.


But think.



I know.


That's quiet.


Okay.


I dream.


I think.





I sleep.




Think.







Just.



That sounds nice
